title: The Mongols
director: André De Toth, Leopoldo Savona, Riccardo Freda
writer: Ottavio Alessi, Alessandro Ferraù, Ernesto Gastaldi
actors: Jack Palance, Anita Ekberg, Antonella Lualdi
plot: During the Mongol invasion of Poland, a conflict between Mongol Emperor Genghis Khan and his oldest son Ogotai ensues when the former aims for peace and the latter itches for war and conquest.
